texto: Arms wrapped around [Darcy's] abdomen from the back. Fingers felt for the spot above his navel. Two fists pushed in and upward. Darcy felt a violent squeezing sensation. The offending prawn shot out of his gullet, flew across the table, and knocked Tate's wine glass over...Tate looked down at the partially chewed shrimp in disgust and covered it with his napkin.
explicacao: Citação de Donna Warner & Gloria Ferris sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Arms wrapped around [Darcy's] abdomen from the back. Fingers felt for the spot above his navel.
